title: Goal Profile
description: A weighted priority vector across modalities, plus the phase sequence and prerequisites needed to generate a complete training program for a given objective.

description.description: One or two sentences describing who this goal profile is for and what outcome it targets.

event_date.description: ISO date of the target event, if applicable. Drives taper timing and total program length. null if open-ended.

priorities.description: Weighted priority vector across modalities. Values should sum to 1.0. The scheduler uses these weights to allocate session slots.

primary_sources.description: Philosophy IDs that govern this goal profile. When philosophies conflict, the first listed takes priority.

phase_sequence.description: Ordered meso-level phases from program start to event. Defines the periodization structure.

phase.description: Phase type. Maps to training phase in constraint schema.

weeks.description: Duration of this phase in weeks.

focus.description: Free text description of what this phase emphasizes. e.g. 'aerobic_base + strength_endurance'

priority_override.description: If set, temporarily overrides the top-level priority vector during this phase.

minimum_prerequisites.description: Minimum benchmark values an athlete must meet before this program starts. Keys are benchmark IDs; values are the minimum acceptable score.

incompatible_with.description: Goal profile IDs that cannot be run concurrently with this one. The system should warn if both are requested.

framework_selection.description: Which framework to use by default, and under what conditions alternatives are acceptable.

default_framework.description: Framework ID to use unless overridden.

condition.description: When to use this framework instead. e.g. 'days_per_week <= 3'
